classRating: "class5"
ydsRating: "10"
ydsSubRating: "-"
pitches: 6
parentArea: content/areas/mythic-peak.mdx
summitCoords: "48.7134, -121.9613"
---

- [http://www.stephabegg.com/home/tripreports/washington/northcascades/mythic2](http://www.stephabegg.com/home/tripreports/washington/northcascades/mythic2)

ot;t&quot;:&quot;&quot;},{&quot;it&quot;:5,&quot;is&quot;:1.4285714285714286,&quot;ic&quot;:&quot;#ffff00&quot;,&quot;ia&quot;:1,&quot;x&quot;:454,&quot;y&quot;:565,&quot;t&quot;:&quot;1&quot;,&quot;ta&quot;:&quot;l&quot;,&quot;tb&quot;:false},{&quot;it&quot;:0,&quot;is&quot;:1.4285714285714286,&quot;ic&quot;:&quot;#ffff00&quot;,&quot;ia&quot;:1,&quot;lw&quot;:3,&quot;cp&quot;:[{&quot;x&quot;:491,&quot;y&quot;:569},{&quot;x&quot;:499,&quot;y&quot;:536},{&quot;x&quot;:501,&quot;y&quot;:515},{&quot;x&quot;:536,&quot;y&quot;:488},{&quot;x&quot;:579,&quot;y&quot;:461},{&quot;x&quot;:611,&quot;y&quot;:469},{&quot;x&quot;:627,&quot;y&quot;:441},{&quot;x&quot;:643,&quot;y&quot;:414},{&quot;x&quot;:651,&quot;y&quot;:385},{&quot;x&quot;:659,&quot;y&quot;:357}],&quot;nl&quot;:10,&quot;fl&quot;:10,&quot;lc&quot;:false},{&quot;it&quot;:0,&quot;is&quot;:1.4285714285714286,&quot;ic&quot;:&quot;#ffff00&quot;,&quot;ia&quot;:1,&quot;lw&quot;:3,&quot;cp&quot;:[{&quot;x&quot;:651,&quot;y&quot;:346},{&quot;x&quot;:631,&quot;y&quot;:325},{&quot;x&quot;:607,&quot;y&quot;:315},{&quot;x&quot;:574,&quot;y&quot;:295},{&quot;x&quot;:547,&quot;y&quot;:280},{&quot;x&quot;:515,&quot;y&quot;:263}],&quot;nl&quot;:10,&quot;fl&quot;:10,&quot;lc&quot;:false},{&quot;it&quot;:4,&quot;is&quot;:1.4285714285714286,&quot;ic&quot;:&quot;#ffff00&quot;,&quot;ia&quot;:1,&quot;lw&quot;:2,&quot;x&quot;:591,&quot;y&quot;:1321,&quot;w&quot;:18,&quot;h&quot;:18,&quot;t&quot;:&quot;&quot;},{&quot;it&quot;:0,&quot;is&quot;:1.4285714285714286,&quot;ic&quot;:&quot;#ffff00&quot;,&quot;ia&quot;:1,&quot;lw&quot;:3,&quot;cp&quot;:[{&quot;x&quot;:593,&quot;y&quot;:1301},{&quot;x&quot;:629,&quot;y&quot;:1187},{&quot;x&quot;:623,&quot;y&quot;:1035},{&quot;x&quot;:577,&quot;y&quot;:967},{&quot;x&quot;:547,&quot;y&quot;:947},{&quot;x&quot;:505,&quot;y&quot;:897},{&quot;x&quot;:467,&quot;y&quot;:815},{&quot;x&quot;:447,&quot;y&quot;:761},{&quot;x&quot;:395,&quot;y&quot;:719},{&quot;x&quot;:397,&quot;y&quot;:657},{&quot;x&quot;:433,&quot;y&quot;:613},{&quot;x&quot;:481,&quot;y&quot;:581}],&quot;nl&quot;:10,&quot;fl&quot;:10,&quot;lc&quot;:false},{&quot;it&quot;:0,&quot;is&quot;:1.4285714285714286,&quot;ic&quot;:&quot;#ffff00&quot;,&quot;ia&quot;:1,&quot;lw&quot;:3,&quot;cp&quot;:[{&quot;x&quot;:531,&quot;y&quot;:157},{&quot;x&quot;:533,&quot;y&quot;:120},{&quot;x&quot;:512,&quot;y&quot;:74},{&quot;x&quot;:539,&quot;y&quot;:39}],&quot;nl&quot;:10,&quot;fl&quot;:10,&quot;lc&quot;:false},{&quot;it&quot;:5,&quot;is&quot;:1.4285714285714286,&quot;ic&quot;:&quot;#ffff00&quot;,&quot;ia&quot;:1,&quot;x&quot;:553,&quot;y&quot;:79,&quot;t&quot;:&quot;5 and 6&quot;,&quot;ta&quot;:&quot;l&quot;,&quot;tb&quot;:false}]}"
  topoOverlaySrc="data:image/png;base64,"
/>

![[https://cascadeclimbers.com/plab/data/504/mythic_wall_topo.jpg](https://cascadeclimbers.com/plab/data/504/mythic_wall_topo.jpg)](https://andrewbares.blob.core.windows.net/hiking-blog-images/2019/08/mythic_wall_topo1-831x1024.jpg)

![[https://cascadeclimbers.com/forum/topic/35315-tr-the-mythical-bellingham-big-wall-7212005/?tab=comments#comment-479363](https://cascadeclimbers.com/forum/topic/35315-tr-the-mythical-bellingham-big-wall-7212005/?tab=comments#comment-479363)](https://andrewbares.blob.core.windows.net/hiking-blog-images/2020/05/Mythic.uTSJPjjG.jpg)

P1 (5.8, 55m) Start directly below the only tree on the lower face. Pass a horizontal fault at 40', pull through steep black rock then follow ramps and corners to the tree.

P2 (5.9+, 45m) Hard moves off the belay, then climb up and right until you can traverse right into discontinuous corners. Follow these to a large ledge splitting the face.

P3 (5.4, 25m) Walk left then traverse up and left on a loose-looking but solid rock. Belay near another tree below face cracks on the smooth wall.

P4 (5.10-, 40m) Link face cracks up and right (crux). When they end at a L-facing corner pull out right around the corner onto an easy face.

P5 (5.9, 40m) Climb a nice L-facing corner, then pull a roof. Hand traverse left below the next roof into a fun dihedral. Below more roofs move out left to a belay.

P6 (5.7, 20m) Steep flakes lead to the ridgeline.

## Pitch 1 - 5.8, 55m

Start directly below the only tree on the lower face. Pass a horizontal fault at 40', pull through steep black rock then follow ramps and corners to the tree.

<RouteOverlay 
  imageSrc="https://andrewbares.blob.core.windows.net/hiking-blog-images/2019/08/36261683961_1ccc067759_o.hLuIOOis-683x1024.jpg" 
  topoData="{&quot;items&quot;:[{&quot;it&quot;:4,&quot;is&quot;:1.4285714285714286,&quot;ic&quot;:&quot;#ffff00&quot;,&quot;ia&quot;:1,&quot;lw&quot;:2,&quot;x&quot;:520,&quot;y&quot;:1304,&quot;w&quot;:18,&quot;h&quot;:18,&quot;t&quot;:&quot;&quot;},{&quot;it&quot;:4,&quot;is&quot;:1.4285714285714286,&quot;ic&quot;:&quot;#ffff00&quot;,&quot;ia&quot;:1,&quot;lw&quot;:2,&quot;x&quot;:479,&quot;y&quot;:581,&quot;w&quot;:18,&quot;h&quot;:18,&quot;t&quot;:&quot;&quot;},{&quot;it&quot;:0,&quot;is&quot;:1.4285714285714286,&quot;ic&quot;:&quot;#ffff00&quot;,&quot;ia&quot;:1,&quot;lw&quot;:3,&quot;cp&quot;:[{&quot;x&quot;:514,&quot;y&quot;:1288},{&quot;x&quot;:530,&quot;y&quot;:1161},{&quot;x&quot;:536,&quot;y&quot;:1027},{&quot;x&quot;:533,&quot;y&quot;:973},{&quot;x&quot;:504,&quot;y&quot;:969},{&quot;x&quot;:485,&quot;y&quot;:912},{&quot;x&quot;:425,&quot;y&quot;:848},{&quot;x&quot;:418,&quot;y&quot;:750},{&quot;x&quot;:393,&quot;y&quot;:708},{&quot;x&quot;:422,&quot;y&quot;:645},{&quot;x&quot;:476,&quot;y&quot;:613},{&quot;x&quot;:476,&quot;y&quot;:581}],&quot;nl&quot;:10,&quot;fl&quot;:10,&quot;lc&quot;:false}]}"
  topoOverlaySrc="data:image/png;base64,"
/>

- ![](https://andrewbares.blob.core.windows.net/hiking-blog-images/2020/05/35563150634_1cde0c99d0_o.rMenZWGB-683x1024.jpg)Pitch 1 of Mythic Wall

## Pitch 2 - 5.9+, 45m

Hard moves off the belay, then climb up and right until you can traverse right into discontinuous corners. Follow these to a large ledge splitting the face. 

Or Steph says this is only 5.8...

I was a little uncertain I was on the correct route on this pitch, but I think this is the "shallow corner" system. I actually went left from here into an easier corner, but then had to deal with heinous rope drag after I moved back rightward. 

- ![](https://andrewbares.blob.core.windows.net/hiking-blog-images/2020/05/36261683831_610da1bc92_o.joOa6doi-1024x683.jpg)Pitch 2 of Mythic Wall
- ![](https://andrewbares.blob.core.windows.net/hiking-blog-images/2020/05/35563150254_ddaaa398b1_o.HI3gMQex-1024x683.jpg)Near the top of Pitch 2 of Mythic Wall. Steph actually stopped earlier due to rope drag, so this was the start of her 3rd pitch.

## Pitch 3 - 5.4, 20-25 m

Walk left then traverse up and left on a loose-looking but solid rock. Belay near another tree below face cracks on the smooth wall.

- ![](https://andrewbares.blob.core.windows.net/hiking-blog-images/2020/05/35590805103_23df572895_o.oGRQPY-1024x683.jpg)Pitch 3 of Mythic Wall

## Pitch 4 - 5.10-/5.10a, 40m

Link face cracks up and right (crux). When they end at a L-facing corner pull out right around the corner onto an easy face.

Steph: An awesome finger crack up the clean face. This is the money pitch (as well as the 10a crux pitch) of the route. I was happy to have my set of offsets for this pitch—offsets work well in this rock due to the wedge-like nature of some of the cracks.

- ![](https://andrewbares.blob.core.windows.net/hiking-blog-images/2020/05/36261683611_3ec6818fe9_o.zqwaWwFe-1024x683.jpg)Pitch 4 of Mythic Wall
- ![](https://andrewbares.blob.core.windows.net/hiking-blog-images/2020/05/35590804363_b43dc37cd1_o.ceUodvPx-1024x683.jpg)Pitch 4 of Mythic Wall

## Pitch 5 - 5.9, 40m

Climb a nice L-facing corner, then pull a roof. Hand traverse left below the next roof into a fun dihedral. Below more roofs move out left to a belay.

- ![](https://andrewbares.blob.core.windows.net/hiking-blog-images/2020/05/36398412135_6ea3c4c567_o.DUzL65Z-1024x683.jpg)Looking up Pitch 5, which starts with a nice hand crack in a corner to a roof.
- ![](https://andrewbares.blob.core.windows.net/hiking-blog-images/2020/05/36001956980_c01e7c9a50_o.p7QcxSkf-682x1024.jpg)In this photo, I am pausing at a pretty bouldery 5.9 move to get above the roof. This move seemed a bit harder than 5.9 to me, but probably because it was committing and above gear.
- ![](https://andrewbares.blob.core.windows.net/hiking-blog-images/2019/08/Mythic1.qCOvlHA.jpg)
- ![](https://andrewbares.blob.core.windows.net/hiking-blog-images/2020/05/35590802773_ac608f5d4b_o.swIVlQe-1024x683.jpg)The fun stemming corner on the second half of Pitch 5.
- ![](https://andrewbares.blob.core.windows.net/hiking-blog-images/2020/05/Mythic3.3LzbOsKC.jpg)

## Pitch 6 - 5.7, 20m

Steep flakes lead to the ridgeline. 

Steph: A short and easy pitch to the arete.

- ![](https://andrewbares.blob.core.windows.net/hiking-blog-images/2020/05/36398411695_8969c26751_o.bmHUeXE3-1024x683.jpg)

## Pitch 7 - 5.6 (part of Green Creek Arete)

- ![](https://andrewbares.blob.core.windows.net/hiking-blog-images/2020/05/35590801623_0e222dea78_o.GnyiEWVI-1024x683.jpg)Looking up toward the top from where Mythic Wall intersects Green Creek Arete.
- ![](https://andrewbares.blob.core.windows.net/hiking-blog-images/2020/05/36398411325_a9ea3a827d_o.JEvTrp5v-1024x683.jpg)The final steep bit (a couple of 5.6 moves) to the top.
